items.title: Skybreaking
items.medium: Collage (watercolor, mixed media, broken CDs, mosaics, glue)
items.description: Breaking through space, into the void of prismatic light. Originally drawn in 2021 and revisited in 2025, this piece emerged from an extended period of process work and a growing willingness to experiment. Drawings were cut apart, the body fragmented, and reassembled using mosaics and broken CDs to depict what appears in the closed-eye state: black figures suspended in prismatic space. The collage method became a way of pushing the interior image further than drawing alone could reach.

items.title: Fragmented Star
items.medium: Collage (watercolor, mixed media, broken CDs, mosaics, glue)
items.description: A star was born, a fragmented king. Originally drawn in 2021 and revisited in 2025, this piece shares the same process as Skybreaking: drawings cut apart and rebuilt using mosaics and broken CDs to capture what surfaces in the closed-eye state. The fragmentation of the body mirrors the fragmentation of a star, matter dispersed, yet still luminous, still holding form in the breaking.
